title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 10 lines).
summary_text: - Medium: [account_profile.py:12](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/account_profile.py#L12) now says `絵文字は使用しない`, but the same `tone` string still explicitly recommends `‼️感嘆` in the sentence-ending frequency. Since this profile is injected verbatim into generation prompts, the model gets conflicting instructions and may still emit emoji-like punctuation. - Low: [account_profile.py:12](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/account_profile.py#L12) changes policy only in `tone`; `ng_expressions` still does not enforce emoji rejection, so this is guidance-only and can regress silently if prompt adherence drifts. - No security issues found in this diff.
